description: Counterparty references its own institutional non-discrimination policy without imposing obligations beyond applicable law. This is a listed acceptable_variation in the non-discrimination topic; no hard_rejection rule applies to this topic today, so there is no detector to hook, but this exercises the ACCEPT / acceptable_variation gold-case category per issue #183.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: Each party shall comply with its own institutional non-discrimination policy to the extent it does not impose obligations on the other party beyond those required by applicable law.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'Counterparty references its own non-discrimination policy' -> 'compliance with institutional policy where it doesn't impose obligations beyond legal requirements'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
